title: Akshaya Private Limited Holdings Services is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Akshaya Private Limited Holdings Services is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Akshaya Private Limited Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Dhanbad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Akshaya Private Limited Holdings Services:
Akshaya Private Limited Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Akshaya Private Limited Holdings Services!
